title: geum × pratense
intro: Geum × pratense, also known as the meadow avens, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Geum × pratense include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
